summary: Plan-only assessment of five independent open PRs. No merge_candidate is safe because none has complete merge preflight proof with Codex /review, resolved review findings, mergeability, and current-state validation. PR #82585 has a concrete repair-needed path with an executable fix artifact for repairing the contributor branch. PR #82665 is routed to central security handling because the validator classified it as security-sensitive. The remaining PRs need maintainer judgment or author/merge-preflight resolution before finalization.

actions.reason: Maintainer merge decision and required merge preflight are missing; do not merge from this worker result.
Repair the existing contributor branch before any merge consideration; failing proof/checks block merge_candidate.
Active author/waiting-on-author status plus current-main target mismatch require maintainer judgment before repair or merge.
Route only #82665 to central security handling; do not mutate this security-sensitive PR from ProjectClownfish.
Message-delivery risk plus needs-changes review and broad M-sized surface require maintainer judgment before any merge or automated repair path.

needs_human: #82562: maintainer merge decision and complete merge_preflight are missing despite passing checks.
#82618: waiting-on-author/current-main target mismatch needs maintainer judgment before repair or merge.
